transcript: Speaker A: SpeakX mundu andaru nannu office lo file vadu ani pilchevaru endukante naku English radu kabatti nenu file chesevadni kabatti. Anthe kakunda credit motham inkokallu tisukunetollu. Janalu kevalam English matladadam vallane life lo munduki velthunnaru ani telusukunappude nenu decide ayya ila aithe nadavadu ani. Indulo unna AI teachers tho rojuko oka 10 minutes matladadam valla 2 weeks lone naku English matladadam confidence vachindi. Ippudu meeting lo yes sir no sir ane kadu, "Here is my opinion sir" ani cheppagaluguthunnanu. Ippudu andari mundu naku respect anedi vachindi. Career lo meeru munduki vellalante SpeakX ni download chesukoni mee opinions anni open ga cheppukondi. [Before SpeakX, everyone in my office called me 'file guy' because I didn't know English and just filed papers, while others took the credit. Realizing English is key to career growth, I decided to change. Practicing with AI teachers on SpeakX for 10 minutes daily gave me English confidence in 2 weeks. Now, I actively share my opinions in meetings and have earned respect. Download SpeakX to boost your career.]
on_screen_text: hani SpeakX mundu [Before SpeakX], pilchewaar indu [called me], kante nak English [because I English], nenu file chesewa [I used to file], kabaddi Ante [so], kakonda credit [besides credit], tiskunatola [took it], vallane Life [because of that, life], naar anu telsukunapude [when I realized], I decided to walk, teachers to rojko [with teachers daily], valla 2 Weeks [because of that, 2 weeks], na English matladdam [my English speaking], conference wachindi [confidence came], No sir ane kaadu [not just saying no sir], Here is my opinion, udhunandu Pudu [now], vachindi Career [career came], ke vallalante [if you want to go], chesukoni Ne [by doing]
summary: A young man shares how he was disrespected and passed over for credit at his office because he couldn't speak English. He explains how practicing for 10 minutes daily with SpeakX's AI teachers gave him the confidence to speak up in meetings within two weeks. He urges viewers to download the app to advance their careers.
